name: rootlens-kg-management-studio
title: brainstorm: RootLens KG management studio foundation
description: Add a non-mutating KG management foundation for source registry browsing, candidate KG inspection, and review-ready graph adjustment drafts.
creator: elebirds
notes: Added a read-only KG Studio API payload, frontend KG candidate/source/provenance review panel, smoke coverage, tests, and documentation. Feedback remains append-only and does not mutate KG CSVs.
